findings.warning_text: 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
findings.warning_format: Yellow warning banner with ⚠ icon at top of chat area
findings.expected_text_match: 보안 정책 — found in warning message
console_observations: GSI_LOGGER: FedCM get() rejects with NetworkError: Error retrieving a token
findings.apf_behavior: APF intercepts the SSE response stream after sending HTTP 200, closes the connection, and injects a warning message into the chat UI. The warning appears as a prominent yellow banner with Korean text explaining the security policy block.

notes: Phase 3 check-warning verification PASSED. ChatGPT APF warning is working correctly. The test prompt containing '주민등록번호' (resident registration number) triggered APF to block the response and display a security policy warning. The warning text '민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다' was displayed as a yellow banner. Console confirmed the POST to /backend-anon/f/conversation was closed with ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED after 200 status.
